svg.title: PetHaus information architecture — 3-tier hierarchy
svg.desc: Three-tier IA: Tier 1 is a pet species profile entry point. Tier 2 shows six species options. Tier 3 shows five functional categories within each species. Tier 4 shows sub-filter examples within Health and Wellness.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the pet profile entry point work in PetHaus?')
g.text: user declares their pet · catalogue filters to match

svg.text: Open card sort · 15 participants · 50 product cards
13/15 participants used species names as primary labels · 15/15 separated exotic from dog & cat
